name: Fenwick rewire - whole house
notes: Full rewire, 1928 twin in Glenside. Knob-and-tube out, new 200A service, room by room.

name: Service + panel
notes: Meter base, mast, 200A panel, grounding. Coordinate with PECO for reconnect.

name: Permits + inspection
notes: L&I rough-in and final. Township inspector sign-off before drywall closes up.
